chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Divorce of a Woman Who Has Not Been Consummated and the Ruling on a Woman Whose Husband Passes Away Before or After Consummation

text: 4775 - وَ فِي رِوَايَةِ اَلْبَزَنْطِيِّ : "أَنَّ مُتْعَةَ اَلْمُطَلَّقَةِ فَرِيضَةٌ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4775 - In the narration of Al-Bazanti:
"The mut'ah (compensatory gift) for a divorced woman is an obligation (faridah)."
